text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm heading to my office with
Matikanetannhauser, when...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Yeah... It's been hurting since I woke up this
morning. I wonder if I did something unhealthy...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Let's see... I've been getting plenty of sleep
recently.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
There haven't been any major changes to my
workout schedule, and I'm eating plenty.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Oh, the air pressure is low today. Maybe that's it.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I've got it! I'll make a sunshine doll to help the
weather improve when I get back to my room!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Rain, rain, go away! Munmunmun another day!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Owww... Singing makes my head throb...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanetannhauser continues to suffer from her
headache for some time.
